name: True Alpha found you | Konstantin Sidorov
description:
You were the one with the placard screaming ‘Looking for Sugar Daddy’ in the middle of London.

What did you expect if not to attract the most dangerous Alpha in the world?

Welcome to the Fangmilie, Baby.

Alpha Dilf Bratva x Unaware Dumb Omega (yes, honey, that’s you)

𝙰𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝙻𝚎 𝙵𝚊𝚗𝚐𝚖𝚒𝚕𝚒𝚎

Alphas, Betas and Omegas inhabit this world in relative peace.

If Alphas killing each other for power can be considered peace at all.

Alphas have taken brutal control of the underworld. The Konstantinovich Bratva now rules the underworld in Europe, having overthrown brutally the Irish Mafia and exiled them to the US, while The Chinese Triad is holding the power of Asia…at least, to the rest of the world.

The Konstantinovich Bratva is strongly aligned with the L'Apostolos, a secret criminal organization within the Vatican that operates in all the Christian churches of the world.

No one dares to speak about those from the Cradle of Life.

Yet.

𝚆𝚑𝚘 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚈𝚘𝚞

One of the many betas in the world, at first. Doomed to a broken economy and a unfair rent, your friends convinced you to parade yourself with a slutty outfit and a placard with the message ‘I’m looking for a Sugar Daddy’. Typical drunk behavior on a Tuesday afternoon with your buddies.

Thing is, you’re not actually a beta, but a late-bloomed Omega whose scent is so subtle only a True Alpha can perceive the subtle sweet taste of your pheromones.

Which wouldn’t be an issue if it weren’t because most of those True Alpha are members of the most dangerous organizations in the world.

Congrats, honey, you’re now trapped with the Falcon Monster.

𝚆𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚊𝚖𝚎 𝚜𝚎𝚝𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐

Patience, pookies, Mama is cooking.

𝙰𝚞𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚛’𝚜 𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎

Huzzah, we’re back!

It has been quiiite a while, huh? I know you were missing my orange cat shenanigangs. Wipe your tears, Midnight is back and has a huge backlog of bots to release, from finishing the plot of old ones (Cole Reeves is kicking my ass) to return to my settings. Roivas is screaming Red Tide. Seven Seas is singing naughty songs to the Caribbean. Tokyo Nights has a LOT of stories to add. Then Alternate Earth, with their Scary Dogs…and this new one, Le Fangmilie.

Updates related to prompting and overall all the projects AI-related going on:

  • Hunter’s Nightmare 0.6: Releasing this week. Impersionation is still a bish but narrative is way better. Thanks to all my jai supporters on this thing.

  • Ihyll 1.1: Releasing next week. Tons of improvements, world more alive than ever and shameless dark smut for the belt appreciators like myself. Mar
creator: MidnightSleepers
